mapper.select: SELECT * FROM saf.tn_saf_cert WHERE cert_id = #{certId} AND use_end_dt > NOW()
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(cert_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) AS INTEGER)), 0) FROM saf.tn_saf_cert WHERE cert_id LIKE #{prefix} || '%' AND SUBSTRING(cert_id, LENGTH(#{prefix}) + 1) ~ '^[0-9]+$'
mapper.update: UPDATE saf.tn_saf_cert SET cert_schm_cd = #{certSchmCd}, cert_no = #{certNo}, file_id = #{fileId}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE cert_id = #{certId} AND srnd_yn = 'N' AND use_end_dt > NOW()
UPDATE saf.tn_saf_cert SET srnd_yn = 'Y', srnd_dt = CURRENT_DATE, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE cert_id = #{certId} AND srnd_yn = 'N' AND use_end_dt > NOW()
UPDATE saf.tn_saf_cert SET use_end_dt = NOW() - INTERVAL '1 minute', last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE cert_id = #{certId} AND srnd_yn = 'N' AND use_end_dt > NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT audit_id AS audit_sn, cert_id, actn_cd, actn_user_id AS user_id, actn_dt, rmrk FROM saf.tn_saf_cert_audit WHERE cert_id = #{certId} ORDER BY audit_id
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(audit_id), 0) FROM saf.tn_saf_cert_audit WHERE cert_id = #{certId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO saf.tn_saf_cert_audit (cert_id, actn_cd, actn_user_id, actn_dt) VALUES (#{certId}, #{actnCd}, #{userId}, NOW())
